GenEd (3 credits)

GenEd (3 credits)

UNIV 100 (1 credit) The Student in the University

Two hours of lecture per week for 12 weeks. Introduces students to University life.

or

UNIV 101 (2 credits) The Student in the University and Introduction to Computer Resources

Two hours of lecture per week. Introduces students to University life and current computer resources.
